query: I was charged twice this month and I want a refund.
final_response: I understand you've been charged twice this month and are requesting a refund. I cannot directly process refunds or confirm eligibility, as our AI system does not handle these sensitive transactions. To investigate this further and review your account details for potential refund eligibility based on our policies, I need to escalate your request to a specialized support agent. They will review your billing history, plan type, and relevant refund criteria promptly. Duplicate charges can occur due to a system error. Please contact support with your transaction ID, and we will investigate and refund the duplicate charge within 5-7 business days.
